# BANK OF AI Website

## Service

- FQN: `bankofai-site`
- Service URL: `https://gateway.bankofai.io/providers/bankofai-site`
- Category: `finance`
- Chains: `eip155:97`

## Endpoints

### GET /

BANK OF AI homepage HTML.

- URL: `https://gateway.bankofai.io/providers/bankofai-site/`
- Price: `$0.001`

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://gateway.bankofai.io/providers/bankofai-site/'
```

### GET /favicon.ico

BANK OF AI favicon.

- URL: `https://gateway.bankofai.io/providers/bankofai-site/favicon.ico`
- Price: free

```bash
curl 'https://gateway.bankofai.io/providers/bankofai-site/favicon.ico'
```
